content.body: Does TG3 have any interest in understanding the potential impact from cybersecurity regulation on development activities, or do y'all keep scoped to the content of the standard?
there is precedent for discussing things that are outside our scope -- the main thing is whether we have more salient topics on the agenda
I believe we have another topic today, for at least part of the time, but please join anyway if you can, since we aren't guaranteed to have the right folks in the room for the existing topic
